creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This museum in Dubai is one of a kind! 🤩

Arte Museum is a multi-sensory digital art exhibition. We went on a delightful journey through art, sounds and scents! 

Here are the highlights of our visit:
🍵 Having iced drinks at the mystical tea bar
🖍️ Coloring a creature to be displayed at the live sketchbook and live canvas
✨ Being immersed with amazing digital art - Waterfall Infinite, Beach Aurora, Flower Camellia, and a lot more! 

📍 @artemuseum_dubai Dubai Mall
🎟️ General Admission + Arte Tea Bar online price: AED 149
🎟️ VIP ticket: AED 249 includes VIP lounge access, refreshments, tour guide, Arte Tea Bar access, two souvenirs from Arte Shop

Save this for your next Dubai trip and tag your art enthusiast friend! 

@branddubai #DubaiDestinations
